title: Jacob's Weapons
description: This mod adds a ton of new weapons and combat-related features. Includes new Enchants, Tools, Structures, and More!
body:
Jacob's Weapons adds new combat weapons, enchantments, and utilities.

# Weapons

## Hammers
- Can be crafted from any metal material.
- Break Blocks similar to a pickaxe.
- Can not have Silk Touch or Mending, but can have a new Enchantment that allows breaking multiple blocks simultaneously.
- Mid-tier damage and slow speed.
- Breaks shields.
![Netherite Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c841c7f7d130d2ea75d8261c59ce881744d2fa7.png)

## Scythes
- Craftable from any material
- High damage but slow speed.
- Has Sweeping damage like swords.
- Instead of dealing knockback pulls entities closer to the attacker.
![Iron Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07d830c342f06ed7597205f071ae9a09cb30fa50.png)

## Spear
- An early game craftable version of the Trident.
- Loyalty Enchantment is slower than on a Trident.
- Riptide Enchantment doesn't send you as far as on a Trident.
- Incompatible with Channeling Enchantment.

## Slime Balls
- Can now be thrown.
- Will bounce off surfaces and eventually drop back as an item.
- If it collides with an entity or a honey block it will drop as an item immediately.
### Magma Cream
- Can be thrown just like Slime Balls.
- Will light entities it collides with on fire.

## Archery
### Scatter Crossbow (From MC Dungeons)
- Naturally has Multishot.
- Pillagers have a rare chance to spawn with one of these instead of a normal crossbow.
- Pillagers wielding a Scatter Crossbow have a rare chance to drop it upon death.
### Ender Arrow
- Similar to an Ender Pearl when colliding with something will teleport the shooter.
- Does more damage to the teleporter than an Ender Pearl.
### Prismarine Arrow
- Like a Trident can be shot underwater efficiently.
### Slime Arrow
- Bounces off of surfaces like a Slime Ball.
### Seeking Arrow
- Crafted with Amethyst and Echo Shards
- Shoots like a normal arrow but after hitting a block will listen for an entity to walk near.
- When it senses an entity's vibrations it will turn into a homing arrow and chase the entity it sensed.

## Armor
### Ocelot Armor (From MC Dungeons)
- Weak armor crafted from ocelot pelts.
- Gives wearer a speed buff for each piece worn.
### Golden Crown
- Found in a new structure, the Nether Crypt.
- Is considered Golden Armor.
- Gives +25% Damage buff.

## Explosives
### Primed TNT
- Places already ignited TNT that explodes after a short fuse.
### Fireball
- A throwable version of a Ghast's fireball. Similar to popular minigames.

## New Mobs
![Piglin Revenant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d197c06ea2c7f6df9858ca34448725f2c9f02a06.png)
### Revenant
- Spawns in a new structure, the Nether Crypt.
- Uses Scythe as a weapon.
- Withers enemies.
### Mossy Skeleton (From MC Dungeons)
- Spawns in jungles at night.
- Shoots poison-tipped arrows.
### Sunken (From MC Dungeons)
- Spawns in Oceans.
- Uses a crossbow as a weapon.
- Shoots Prismarine Arrows & drops them upon death.

# Enchantments
### Curse of Fragility
- Max Level: 2
- Will cause items to take 1 more damage than normal for each level.

## Weapon
### Bane of Illagers
- Max Level: 5
- Damage Enchantment.
- Does increased damage to Pillagers.
### Freezing
- Max Level: 3
- Incompatible with Fire Aspect
- Applies freezing ticks to the damaged entity. (Same as Powdered Snow)
### Leaching
- Max Level: 3
- Heals the player a small % of the base damage. (Not Including Mob Type Damage Modifiers)
- Incompatible with Sharpness.

## Armor
### Curse of Density
- Max Level: 3
- Leggings Enchantment.
- Will cause the wearer to sink faster in water.
- Incompatible with Swift Sneak.
### Curse of [Faux](https://www.dictionary.com/browse/faux)
- When worn piglins will be aggressive towards the player. (Even if wearing Golden Armor)

## Tool
### Crumbling
- Max Level: 4
- Hammer Exclusive Enchantment.
- Allows you to mine multiple blocks at once.
- For each level, you will be able to break more blocks at once but will mine slower.
- Your Hammer will take 1 damage for each block broken.
- Incompatible with Efficiency.
### Inquisition
- Max Level: 2
- Spyglass Enchantment.
- At Level 1: You can zoom the spyglass out using the mouse wheel.
- At Level 2: You can zoom in further with the spyglass using the mouse wheel.

# Food
### Golden Head
- Based on UHC.
- Extremely quick to consume.
- Crafted by surrounding a player head with gold.
### Death Cap Mushroom
- Gives Mushroomized effect to the player reducing attack cooldowns.

# Nether Crypts
- New structure that spawns in the nether.
- Guarded by Piglin Revenants.
- Contains treasures like gold, netherite, and Crowns.
###Is currently in an early form that is subject to change.
I would eventually like to do a complete rework changing them from a small little tomb into a larger more complex maze-like structure.

# Compatability
### [Vanilla Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-variants)
- Adds Scythe and Hammer Variants of Vanilla Variants Tools.
